ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Mar-30-2015 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Mar-09-2015 Continued To Mar-30-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Preliminary Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-17-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Alexis Malone for (administrator) Joanne Lara.

Ms. Malone reported that the only items outstanding are statutory fees and expenses, no objections have been raised and that there is a stipulation regarding payment from the one outstanding creditor. The Court granted the petition for preliminary distribution (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Paul H. Alavarado. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Choi. (Not Reported)
